event.description: {CovLStrv2{{t{This greater-than-or-equal-to-zero comparison of an unsigned value is always true. {0}.}{{code{pACRotData->sDeviceStatus.uwRecoveryReasonCode >= 0U}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{This greater-than-or-equal-to-zero comparison of an unsigned value is always true. {0}.}{{code{pDeviceReset->ubDeviceResetControl >= 0U}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{This greater-than-or-equal-to-zero comparison of an unsigned value is always true. {0}.}{{code{pDeviceReset->ubForcedRecovery >= 0U}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{This greater-than-or-equal-to-zero comparison of an unsigned value is always true. {0}.}{{code{pDeviceReset->ubInterfaceControl >= 0U}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{This greater-than-or-equal-to-zero comparison of an unsigned value is always true. {0}.}{{code{pRecoveryCtrl->ubRecoveryImageSelection >= 0U}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{This greater-than-or-equal-to-zero comparison of an unsigned value is always true. {0}.}{{code{pACRotData->sDeviceStatus.uwRecoveryReasonCode >= 0U}}}}}}
